title: microseris aphantocarpha var. indivisa
intro: Microseris aphantocarpha var. indivisa is a plant species also known as a wild dandelion or false dandelion, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microseris aphantocarpha var. indivisa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its potential health benefits.
